policy.figi_no_repeat_probe: Reviewed OpenFIGI no-match or cross-ISIN rows stay excluded until stronger reviewed FIGI evidence exists.
policy.scope_before_fill: Core-exclusion candidates must be decided as core, extended, or excluded before ISIN, FIGI, sector, or ETF-category enrichment.
policy.tmx_first: TMX/Cboe Canada official listing context is the first gate; issuer, CSD, transfer-agent, prospectus, or reviewed identifier sources are required for missing ISINs.
